Introduction

Tommy developer documentation.

Tommy Developer Documentation

Tommy is a workforce and care management platform with mobile, web, API, and addon surfaces.

This Sourcey site is currently focused on the MCP server reference. The MCP tab starts as a static contract placeholder and will be expanded as Tommy moves the Workforce Bot and related AI tooling onto a RubyLLM-backed MCP architecture.
